title: A solid disc with one precise V-notch shows that the only valid entry is structural — the material itself has no other opening, so invalid states are absent rather than refused. The notch is the one governed path; everything else is matter.
conceptualBridge: The notched disc means one valid path because the contract is a closed body with only a single structural entry point.
decision: Removed: avg 3.5 below threshold and single-entry-point metaphor is covered more compellingly by 28-ruled-gate and 25-inspection-window.
